infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Explore Kenya uses your location to show nearby destinations and help you navigate to attractions.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Explore Kenya uses your camera so you can broadcast live wildlife and travel moments.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Explore Kenya uses your microphone so viewers can hear your live broadcast.
